headline: How The Investment Story For Avery Dennison (AVY) Is Quietly Shifting On Wall Street
summary: Avery Dennison’s fair value estimate has been nudged from $211.90 to $210.00, a modest reset that captures a slightly more cautious stance in recent modeling work. That change sits alongside a split in analyst views, with some firms lifting targets and others trimming them, reflecting different opinions on how well the company can balance growth, margins, and risk at current prices. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep track of the evolving story...
